recommendations.title: Sharknado 5: Global Swarming
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Fin and his wife April travel around the world to save their young son who's trapped inside a sharknado.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No!
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The sharks take bite out of the East Coast when the sharknado hits Washington, D.C. and Orlando, Florida.

recommendations.title: The Last Sharknado: It's About Time
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Our hero Fin has battled sharks all over the globe, but in this last installment he will tackle the final shark-tier - time travel.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 4: The 4th Awakens
recommendations.overview: The new installment of the Sharknado franchise takes place 5 years after Sharknado 3: Oh Hell No! There have been no Sharknados in the intervening years, but now they’re appearing again in unexpected ways.

recommendations.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
recommendations.overview: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

recommendations.title: Boo

recommendations.title: Mickey's Christmas Carol

recommendations.title: I Am Legend

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.
